name: Blueshift AI Customer Engagement Platform API
what_it_does: AI-powered customer engagement platform with REST API — combining customer data platform (CDP), AI-driven predictive recommendations, and cross-channel campaign orchestration (email, SMS, push, in-app) to deliver personalized customer experiences at scale using machine learning models built on first-party behavioral data.
use_cases: Syncing customer behavioral events and profile data to Blueshift CDP via REST API
Triggering AI-personalized campaigns across email, SMS, and push via Blueshift API
Querying Blueshift predictive segments and recommendation outputs for downstream use
Integrating Blueshift with data warehouse (Snowflake, BigQuery) for customer data activation
Managing Blueshift campaign performance and engagement metrics for reporting
not_for: Simple email marketing without AI personalization (use Mailchimp or Klaviyo for basic email)
Pure SMS marketing without cross-channel orchestration (use Postscript for SMS-only)
Enterprise marketing resource management (use Adobe Workfront or Wrike for project management)
best_when: An e-commerce, media, or financial services company wants AI-powered personalization and cross-channel engagement built on first-party behavioral data — competing with Braze and Iterable but with stronger native AI/ML prediction capabilities.
avoid_when: You have limited first-party data (AI personalization needs volume), primarily need simple batch email campaigns, or are a small team without data engineering resources.

auth.notes: API key from Blueshift dashboard. HTTP Basic auth with API key as username. Account-scoped access. Webhook for campaign events and segment membership changes. JavaScript SDK for event tracking. Mobile SDK for iOS/Android push and in-app. REST API for customer data, segments, campaigns, and events. No OAuth2. Snowflake/BigQuery direct sync via native connectors.

pricing.notes: San Jose company. Founded 2014. Raised $55M total. Backed by Norwest Venture Partners, Softbank Ventures. AI-first marketing platform competing with Braze, Iterable, and Emarsys. Predictive AI models (next best action, churn prediction, LTV scoring) built on behavioral data are core differentiators. 300+ enterprise customers including LendingTree, Discovery+, Udemy. Unified data layer (customer 360) with AI models for next-action prediction.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for customers, events, campaigns, and segments. HTTP Basic auth with API key. Good developer documentation. Event tracking model follows Blueshift schema (customer ID, event name, properties). SDK required for mobile push and in-app. Webhook for campaign events. AI prediction models not directly configurable via API — managed in Blueshift UI.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Customer reads fully idempotent. Event tracking uses customer ID + event ID for deduplication. Campaign reads idempotent. Customer create/update uses upsert semantics — idempotent with same ID.
known_agent_gotchas: HTTP Basic auth with API key as username (not Bearer token) — unusual auth pattern
Event schema must match Blueshift event taxonomy — custom events require prior configuration
AI models are managed by Blueshift team — not directly API-configurable
Mobile SDK required for push notifications and in-app messages — separate from REST API
Annual contract with enterprise pricing — validate AI prediction ROI before committing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2 compliant. US and EU data residency. HTTP Basic auth with API key — less secure than OAuth2; rotate API keys regularly. Customer behavioral data is sensitive PII — implement data minimization. AI model training on customer data requires documented legal basis under GDPR. Predictive scoring data (churn probability, LTV) is derived data — handle per privacy policy.
